_publications._publicationTitle: Impact of MEK Inhibitor Therapy on Neurocognitive Functioning in NF1.

_contextSnippet: ANOVAs indicated small but significant improvements in BRIEF scores from pretreatment to 24-week follow-up (Metacognition Index [MCI]: F(1,58) = 5.79, p = 0.02, d = 0.18; Behavioral Regulation Index [BRI]: F(1,59) = 9.19, p = 0.004, d = 0.24)
details: Small but significant improvements in BRIEF scores from pretreatment to 24-week follow-up (Metacognition Index: F(1,58) = 5.79, p = 0.02, d = 0.18; Behavioral Regulation Index: F(1,59) = 9.19, p = 0.004, d = 0.24) and 48-week follow-up (MCI: F(1,39) = 7.29, p = 0.01, d = 0.27; BRI: F(1,39) = 5.63, p = 0.02, d = 0.26)
